name: Satsa-Ritual (Evil Spirit Dispersion)
purpose: Expelling lingering vengeful spirits from a living space
steps: Sprinkle sea salt around all entrances of the house.
Burn dried red chili peppers in the center of the main room to create acrid smoke.
Strike the four corners of the room with a peach wood branch while reciting the name of the household deity.
Scatter red beans outside the front door to prevent re-entry.

name: Bujeok Sealing (Talisman Application)
purpose: Creating a spiritual barrier against invisible entities
steps: Purify the mind through meditation and cold water bathing.
Write the specific script for protection using Cinnabar ink.
Burn incense and pass the paper through the smoke three times.
Affix the talisman above the door frame during the Hour of the Dragon (7-9 AM).
